content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks that rely on single-perspective iterative self-feedback can be improved by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective Self-Refine pipeline that preserves the original framework's key advantage of no additional training or supervised data while boosting output quality. This hybrid approach mimics how humans refine ideas by cross-checking inconsistent self-generated perspectives rather than only tweaking a single initial draft.
